## Testing


## Risk Checklist

- [ ] No generated ISO/IMG/VHD/VHDX/QCOW2/object files are included.
- [ ] Disk writes are bounds-checked.
- [ ] Dangerous operations have validation or dry-run behavior.
- [ ] Unsupported filesystem/disk states fail safely.
- [ ] User-visible commands or GUI actions are documented when relevant.
